# API error catalog

Source of truth: `packages/server/supabase/functions/_shared/error-codes.ts`.

Every admin / SDK / webhook failure should return:

```json
{ "ok": false, "error": { "code": "<CODE>", "message": "<safe text>", "requestId": "<optional>" } }
```

## Codes (58)

| Code | Group |
| --- | --- |
| `MISSING_AUTH` | Auth / identity |
| `INVALID_TOKEN` | Auth / identity |
| `MISSING_API_KEY` | Auth / identity |
| `INVALID_API_KEY` | Auth / identity |
| `INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE` | Auth / identity |
| `KEY_NOT_MIGRATED` | Auth / identity |
| `ORG_KEY_NOT_ALLOWED` | Auth / identity |
| `UNAUTHORIZED` | Auth / identity |
| `FORBIDDEN` | Auth / identity |
| `SERVER_MISCONFIGURED` | Auth / identity |
| `NO_ORG` | Tenant / scope |
| `ORG_REQUIRED` | Tenant / scope |
| `NO_ORGANIZATION` | Tenant / scope |
| `NO_PROJECT` | Tenant / scope |
| `PROJECT_NOT_FOUND` | Tenant / scope |
| `PROJECT_NO_ORG` | Tenant / scope |
| `INVALID_PROJECT_ID` | Tenant / scope |
| `INVALID_ORGANIZATION_ID` | Tenant / scope |
| `VALIDATION_ERROR` | Validation |
| `BAD_REQUEST` | Validation |
| `BAD_BODY` | Validation |
| `BAD_JSON` | Validation |
| `INVALID_JSON` | Validation |
| `INVALID_BODY` | Validation |
| `INVALID_PAYLOAD` | Validation |
| `INVALID_INPUT` | Validation |
| `INVALID_SIGNATURE` | Validation |
| `MISSING_BODY` | Validation |
| `MISSING_SIGNATURE` | Validation |
| `NO_SECRET` | Validation |
| `METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED` | Validation |
| `NOT_FOUND` | Validation |
| `CONFLICT` | Validation |
| `DUPLICATE` | Validation |
| `RATE_LIMITED` | Validation |
| `EXPIRED` | Validation |
| `DB_ERROR` | Persistence |
| `RPC_ERROR` | Persistence |
| `INSERT_FAILED` | Persistence |
| `UPDATE_FAILED` | Persistence |
| `DELETE_FAILED` | Persistence |
| `NETWORK_ERROR` | Upstream |
| `TIMEOUT` | Upstream |
| `UPSTREAM_ERROR` | Upstream |
| `GITHUB_ERROR` | Upstream |
| `GH_SECRETS_FORBIDDEN` | Auth / identity |
| `GH_NOT_CONNECTED` | Upstream |
| `LLM_ERROR` | Upstream |
| `LLM_UNAVAILABLE` | Upstream |
| `ALL_KEYS_EXHAUSTED` | Upstream |
| `SECRET_DETECTED` | Upstream |
| `FEATURE_NOT_IN_PLAN` | Entitlement |
| `PLAN_UPGRADE_REQUIRED` | Entitlement |
| `QUOTA_EXCEEDED` | Entitlement |
| `CLIENT_CLOSED_REQUEST` | Transport |
| `INTERNAL` | Transport |
| `INTERNAL_ERROR` | Transport |
| `HTTP_ERROR` | Transport |

## Groups

- **Auth / identity** — missing or invalid JWT / API key / scope
- **Tenant / scope** — org or project context missing or inaccessible
- **Validation** — body / field / signature shape
- **Persistence** — DB / RPC failures (message is always sanitized)
- **Upstream** — GitHub, LLM, network, secret-scan
- **Entitlement** — plan / quota gates
- **Transport** — client abort / internal envelope
